decisions.question: Language/runtime
decisions.rationale: Shared language with frontend, fast iteration, good ecosystem for web APIs.

decisions.question: Database
decisions.rationale: User already has Supabase running locally on Docker. PostgreSQL handles analytical queries well and Supabase provides a managed Postgres experience.

decisions.question: API style
decisions.rationale: Simple and standard. POST /events for ingestion, GET endpoints for queries. No extra tooling needed.

decisions.question: Backend framework
decisions.rationale: Ubiquitous, well-known, minimal. Good enough for this use case.

guardrails: All source files must be TypeScript (no .js)
Event ingestion must validate required fields and return clear errors
No external service dependencies beyond Supabase
